items.title: Oh my god?
items.summary: I've been playing this game for exactly 28 days and. I think I've developed an obsession. I don't play a lot of turn-based games, but this may just be one of, if not my favorite turn-based game. I've always been a fan of Lovecraftian horror, so this is just right up my alley. I've recommended it to dozens of people, that's how much I love it. I'm not even religious but thank whatever higher being is up there that sent the Morimens developers to Earth... Please continue to improve and develop this gam, thank you... 👍 Also, this is literally the first time that I've wrote a review on the App Store...
items.author: Prisoner 004

items.title: 100% WORTH IT
items.summary: Ok so I never leave reviews but WHATTTTT?? ITS SO GOOD AND DEVS ARE SO GENEROUS WITH REWARDS, getting 5 stars is easy. I’m a week in, and I have almost 10. I don’t even play everyday but I LOVE LOVE THE DESIGNS THE CONCEPT I LOVE THE CHARACTERS MY FAVE IS TINCT OMLLL ITS SO GOOD??? It takes up a little storage compared to games like Reverse:1989 or whatever it’s called, GI, HSR, ZZZ, WUWA, even L&D. I. LOVE. ITTT PLZ GET THIS TO MORE PEOPLE OMG IT NEEDS TO HAVE A BIGGER FANBASE. I AM IN LOVE, and I never leave enthusiastic reviews.. ever.
items.author: TheNoorest
